nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

nodes.name: 米纳斯吉拉斯州
nodes.summary: 米纳斯吉拉斯州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联94种鸟类，包括小拟䳍、孤䳍、黄腿穴䳍等94种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 埃斯皮尼亞蘇山脈
nodes.summary: 埃斯皮尼亞蘇山脈是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Sincorá antwren、Cipo canastero，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联914种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等914种鸟类。

nodes.name: Cipo canastero
nodes.summary: Cipo canastero（Cipo canastero，学名 Asthenes luizae），在图谱中标记为近危（NT）物种，主要分布于埃斯皮尼亞蘇山脈、米纳斯吉拉斯州，常见栖息地包括稀树草原，主要威胁包括气候变化。

nodes.name: 气候变化
nodes.summary: 长期改变水文节律与生态系统稳定性的全球变化因素。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The Cipo canastero is found in a few locations in the Espinhaço Mountains of north-central and east-central Minas Gerais, a state in southeastern Brazil

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The Cipo canastero is found in a few locations in the Espinhaço Mountains of north-central and east-central Minas Gerais, a state in southeastern Brazil

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It inhabits areas of rocky outcrops and bushy vegetation in the grasslands of the campos rupestres

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: "Brood parasitism by the recently introduced Shiny Cowbird (Molothrus bonariensis) is thought to be the most serious current threat and the main cause of the species's ongoing decline." Frequent fires in the dry season are also a potentially serious threat especially with the expected increased dryness due to climate change
